common.installDescription: Add Viral Studio to your home screen for the best experience.

landing.title: SINGLE WINDOW
landing.subtitle: One prompt — total presence. Your premium AI content factory that builds videos, texts, and carousels in 5 minutes.
landing.tagline:
Your digital shadow works
while you rest.
landing.featureHubSub: One fragment of thought — total digital presence.
landing.featureConsultantSub: Your personal strategist who knows trends and your niche.
landing.featurePrompterSub: Perfect take every time. AI follows your voice in real-time.
landing.downloadTitle: TAKE THE FACTORY IN YOUR POCKET
landing.creditBonus: Your first 100 credits are on us.

onboarding.step1Sub: Feed the machine with your fragments. The system crystallizes your unique persona.
onboarding.step1AiGreeting: Hi! I'll help calibrate your unique voice. Tell me — what's your niche and how do you usually talk to your audience?
onboarding.step1AiAnswer: I cover cars, keep it short and punchy, a bit ironic. Audience is men 30-45.
onboarding.step1MagicPrompt: Analyze my communication style, professional expertise, and tone of voice based on our interaction. Then, write a 'Digital Shadow Persona' (about 200-300 words). This persona will be used by another AI to write scripts for viral videos that sound exactly like me. Focus on: my vocabulary (slang, professional terms), sentence structure (short/punchy vs long/complex), and my unique perspective on my niche. Output ONLY the persona text.
onboarding.step2Sub: Record a 30-second video. HeyGen will create a digital copy of your face.
onboarding.step2TipText: Look straight into the camera, speak naturally. Light should come from the front. No studio background needed.
onboarding.step3Sub: The bot will deliver your final video, texts and carousel right to your DMs.
onboarding.step3Done: Done! As soon as you open the bot — we'll know.
onboarding.skipWarning: Without DNA, style will be standard. We recommend filling it later.

hero.badge: Viral Engine — AI Content Factory — Now Live
hero.title: ONE IDEA. EVERY FORMAT. DONE.
hero.subtitle: ViralE is your AI-powered content engine. Drop one prompt. Get a faceless video, Instagram carousels, LinkedIn posts, and Threads — all in minutes. Built for creators who are done wasting time on production.

problem.label: // The Problem
problem.title: YOU'RE A CREATOR, NOT AN EDITOR.
problem.subtitle: The average content creator spends over 70% of their time on production — editing, resizing, rewriting, reformatting. That's time stolen from the thing that actually grows your audience: your ideas. ViralE gives it back.
problem.item1Desc: Writing a caption, then a thread, then reformatting for LinkedIn — all from the same idea. Manual, repetitive, brutal.
problem.item2Title: Video is king but costs a fortune
problem.item2Desc: Hiring editors, buying stock footage, syncing subtitles. Most creators can't afford it. ViralE makes you look like you can.
problem.item3Desc: Algorithms reward consistency. But when production takes all day, you fall behind. We fix the bottleneck.

process.label: // The Process
process.title: THREE STEPS. ALL YOUR CONTENT.
process.step1Desc: Create your creator profile — your niche, tone, audience, and content style. This is your DNA. ViralE uses it to make everything feel like YOU, not a generic AI.
process.step2Desc: Our AI suggests high-potential topics based on your DNA — evergreen content, trending hooks, authority pieces. Pick one, or bring your own prompt.
process.step3Desc: ViralE generates your faceless video (or teleprompter script), Instagram carousel, and long-form posts for Threads, LinkedIn, and Facebook — simultaneously.

showcase.label: // What You Get
showcase.title: SIX OUTPUTS. ONE PROMPT.
showcase.subtitle: Every piece is production-ready. Subtitles, b-rolls, captions — all included. Just post.
showcase.videoDesc: Full short-form video with AI-generated voiceover, stock & AI b-roll footage, auto-subtitles, and post-production effects. No camera. No editor. Ready to upload.
showcase.teleprompterDesc: Prefer to be on camera? Get a ready-to-read script with built-in teleprompter inside the app.
showcase.instaSub: 10-slide carousels designed for saves and shares. Formatted, captioned, and on-brand.
showcase.socialSub: Platform-native text posts optimized for each algorithm's format and tone.
showcase.fbSub: Engagement-first copy for community posts and Facebook reach.

dna.label: // Your Creator Identity
dna.title: YOUR DIGITAL DNA IS YOUR SUPERPOWER.
dna.subtitle: Most AI content tools produce generic slop. ViralE is different because it starts with you. Your Digital DNA profile captures your niche, voice, audience type, content angles, and goals. Every output is filtered through it — so it sounds like you wrote it, not a robot.

testimonials.label: // Early Users
testimonials.title: CREATORS LOVE IT.
testimonials.item1Text: "I used to spend Sunday afternoons editing. Now I hit one button and my whole week of content is done. ViralE is the unfair advantage I didn't know existed."
testimonials.item2Text: "The Digital DNA thing is real. My posts actually sound like me. I've tried 6 AI tools and this is the first one that doesn't feel generic."
testimonials.item3Text: "Went from posting twice a week to every day. My growth literally doubled in 30 days. The faceless video feature alone is worth 10x the price."

footer.title: STOP EDITING. START GOING VIRAL.
footer.subtitle: Build your Digital DNA for free in 2 minutes. Your first content set is on us.

assembly.title: Assembly
